title: ProDec 4 piece Emulsion and Gloss 4 inch Mini Paint Rollers, Soft Grip Frame and Tray Set for a Smooth Finish with Emulsion, Gloss and Satin Paints on Interior Walls, Ceilings, Wood and Metal, 4"
features: 4 piece trade quality 4" mini roller set for emulsion and gloss paints
12mm medium pile woven fabric roller ideal for emulsion paints (eg. matt, silk, eggshell) on smooth and semi-smooth surfaces
High density foam roller for lint-free application of gloss and satin paints, as well as undercoat and primer
Ergonomic push fit mini roller frame with soft grip handle for comfort
Black mini tray made from 100% recycled plastic
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint This handy pack covers the most popular paint types and surfaces you'll need a mini roller for. Here's what you get in the pack, the key features and where each roller can be used: Medium pile woven roller Medium pile tiger stripe is ProDec's most popular roller with the trade due to its excellent balance of performance and value. It is a great choice for emulsion on smooth walls and ceilings and is equally at home with masonry paints on semi-smooth surfaces. PAINTS: Emulsion, Masonry SURFACES: Plaster, Drywall, Ceilings (including light to medium textured), Brick High density foam roller Foam mini rollers are widely used by professionals on wood and metal in preference to brushes as they enable faster, more efficient coverage with no brush marks. Trade quality foam is higher density and better quality than DIY grade foam and is a great choice for skirting boards, window sills, doors and panels. PAINTS: Gloss, Satin, Undercoat, Primer SURFACES: Wood, Metal Soft grip frame The frame has an ergonomic soft grip handle for comfort, giving reduced hand fatigue during use. It also features a push fitting for use with an extension pole. Mini tray Made from 100% recycled plastic that is easy to wash out, the tray features a ribbed shoreline to grip the roller so you can easily roll it out without skidding when loading up with paint, giving even distribution and coverage.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎2x mini rollers, mini frame, mini tray
